name: Frozen Almond-Raspberry Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 pint vanilla almond crunch or vanilla frozen yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the graham cracker crumbs, finely chopped almonds, vegetable oil, sugar, and a pinch of salt in a bowl.
2. Press the mixture into an 8-inch-diameter springform pan.
3. Bake at 375°F until just golden brown on edges, about 10 minutes. Allow to cool completely.
4. Once cooled, drop frozen yogurt and sorbet by alternating scoopfuls into the prepared pan.
5. Press the yogurt and sorbet firmly to avoid air spaces. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze until solid, about 4 hours. (Can be prepared up to 5 days in advance.)
6. Release the sides of the pan.
7. Garnish the top of the cake with raspberries.
8. Cut the cake into wedges and serve.
